name: Chocolate Orange Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix graham cracker crumbs with 2 tablespoons sugar, cocoa, and cinnamon.
2. Gradually add melted butter, stirring until crumbs are evenly coated.
3. Press mixture evenly into the bottom and two-thirds up the sides of a greased 9-inch springform pan that has been covered outside with aluminum foil.
4. Refrigerate until ready to fill.
5. Melt chocolate in a double boiler; remove from heat.
6. In a bowl, beat cream cheese on medium speed until smooth and fluffy, about 10 minutes.
7. Beat in sour cream, 3/4 cup sugar, and orange oil.
8. Add eggs one at a time, beating in between.
9. Beat for an additional 1-2 minutes.
10. Using a rubber spatula, gently stir in chocolate until blended.
11. Stir slowly for 1-2 minutes to dispel bubbles.
12. Pour batter into the prepared pan.
13. Bake in a 350-degree oven until puffed and no longer shiny, 35-40 minutes.
14. Center will look wet but will firm up when chilled.
15. Transfer to a wire rack to cool.
16. When cool, remove foil and sides of pan.
17. Cover and refrigerate until firm enough to cut easily, 4-5 hours or overnight.
18. Sift cocoa generously over cake before serving.
19. Serves 6-8.
